location: Dropped by weapon-wielding Albinauric enemies. A group of three sits at a ruin east of the Fallen Ruins of the Lake Site of Grace in Liurnia of the Lakes (two at ground level, one perched above). An alternate cluster is near a shoreline tree close to the Palace Approach Ledge-Road grace in Mohgwyn Palace.
tactics: At the Liurnia ruin, two Albinaurics wait at ground level and a third stands on top of the structure — clear the ground pair first so you're not fighting all three at once.
The Mohgwyn Palace cluster near the shoreline tree is only reachable after progressing far enough to access that region (or via the Deeproot Depths shortcut).
Drop rate is low and reportedly inconsistent — reset at the nearest grace and repeat kills.
lore: A curved blade favored by young Albinaurics, shaped to resemble a partial ripple. Its power draws less from raw muscle and more from the wielder's arcane bent.

builds.name: Arcane Bleed/Status Halberd
builds.why: B scaling in Arcane (rare for a halberd) plus D/D Strength-Dexterity make it one of the best halberds for an Arcane status or bleed build, especially with blood or poison grease.
